notes: not much happening today. waiting on materials mostly
weathers nice though. sunny 24 degrees no wind
just me and one laborer on site doing cleanup and prep for next week
swept out the ground floor, stacked the offcuts into the skip
the safety mesh on the west scaffolding has come loose. tied it back up properly
checked all the fire extinguishers, they're in date. all 4 on the ground floor and 2 on level 1
took some progress photos for the client update. north elevation south elevation and the car park area
material delivery tomorrow morning. 3 pallets of bricks, should arrive by 8. need to make sure theres space near the laydown area
